name: Red Beans & Rice MW (Usa Rice)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Kielbasa sausage, fully cooked and cut into 1/4-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine onions, garlic, bay leaf, cayenne pepper, tomato sauce, Worcestershire sauce, and hot pepper sauce in a 3-quart microproof baking dish.
2. Cover and cook on HIGH (maximum power) for 6 minutes.
3. Add sausage and beans; stir.
4. Reduce setting to MEDIUM (50% power) and cook, covered, for 10 minutes, stirring after 5 minutes.
5. Let stand for 5 minutes. Remove bay leaf.
6. Serve over hot rice. Serve with hot pepper sauce, if desired.
Any type of bean may be substituted. [Karen suggests a red bean.]
